label: Auroraglass Flat
description: Auroraglass Flat is a compact hab-residence sealed within Ashenward City’s slagcrete tierworks, its interior walls faced with black basalt panels to resist abrasive ash infiltration. Narrow, gasketed viewports are glazed in aurora-reactive glass that casts bruised violet reflections across the floor and fittings during the planet’s stormlit nights. A recessed vestibule functions as an ash-lock, with gridded drains and filter housings built into the threshold to trap soot and electrostatic grit. Utilities route through shielded conduit runs and hardline vox points designed for the city’s constant signal corruption and power surges.
